message:
fix: bump ALL workspace member versions and dep specs to 0.2.8

The initial version bump only updated the root [package].version
but left all 6 workspace member crate versions and ~12 internal
dependency version specs at 0.2.7. This would break cargo publish
since version specs wouldn't match.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ crate-type = ["cdylib", "rlib"]
 
 [dependencies]
 # Core Asupersync runtime (no wasm-bindgen in core paths).
-asupersync = { version = "0.2.7", path = "..", default-features = false }
+asupersync = { version = "0.2.8", path = "..", default-features = false }
 
 # WASM boundary tooling.
 wasm-bindgen = "0.2"

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "asupersync-macros"
-version = "0.2.7"
+version = "0.2.8"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../LICENSE"
 description = "Proc macros for asupersync structured concurrency runtime"

@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ crate-type = ["cdylib", "rlib"]
 
 [dependencies]
 # Core Asupersync runtime (no wasm-bindgen in core paths).
-asupersync = { version = "0.2.7", path = "..", default-features = false }
+asupersync = { version = "0.2.8", path = "..", default-features = false }
 
 # WASM boundary tooling.
 wasm-bindgen = "0.2"

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "asupersync-conformance"
-version = "0.2.7"
+version = "0.2.8"
 edition = "2024"
 description = "Conformance test suite for async runtime specifications"
 license-file = "../LICENSE"

@@ -1,15 +1,15 @@
 [package]
 name = "franken-decision"
-version = "0.2.7"
+version = "0.2.8"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../LICENSE"
 description = "Decision Contract schema and runtime for FrankenSuite."
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync"
 keywords = ["decision", "contract", "bayesian", "loss-matrix"]
 
 [dependencies]
-franken-kernel = { version = "0.2.7", path = "../franken_kernel" }
-franken-evidence = { version = "0.2.7", path = "../franken_evidence" }
+franken-kernel = { version = "0.2.8", path = "../franken_kernel" }
+franken-evidence = { version = "0.2.8", path = "../franken_evidence" }
 serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
 
 [dev-dependencies]

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "franken-evidence"
-version = "0.2.7"
+version = "0.2.8"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../LICENSE"
 description = "Canonical EvidenceLedger schema for FrankenSuite decision tracing."

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "franken-kernel"
-version = "0.2.7"
+version = "0.2.8"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../LICENSE"
 description = "Suite-wide type substrate for FrankenSuite: TraceId, DecisionId, PolicyId, SchemaVersion."

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "frankenlab"
-version = "0.2.7"
+version = "0.2.8"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../LICENSE"
 description = "Deterministic testing harness for async Rust: record, replay, and minimize concurrency bugs."
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ name = "frankenlab"
 path = "src/main.rs"
 
 [dependencies]
-asupersync = { version = "0.2.7", path = "..", features = ["cli", "test-internals"] }
+asupersync = { version = "0.2.8", path = "..", features = ["cli", "test-internals"] }
 clap = { version = "4", features = ["derive"] }
 serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
 serde_json = "1.0"
